levels.name: Field Level
levels.description: Premium seating closest to the field, includes dugout and clubhouse seats

zones.name: Clubhouse / Dugout Seats
zones.notes: Most premium seats in the venue, directly behind home plate at field level

zones.name: Field Level Infield
zones.notes: Sections 23A/23B are split sub-sections behind home plate

levels.name: 100 Level
levels.description: Lower bowl seating surrounding the field, from outfield to infield

zones.name: 100 Level Outfield - Right Field
zones.notes: A sections are closer to the field, B sections are further back. Typically among the cheapest lower-level tickets.

zones.name: Bleachers / Right Field Corner
zones.position: Right field corner, near visitor bullpen
zones.notes: Section 104 is bleacher/general admission seating. Section 105 is a single row directly above the visitor bullpen. Sections 106-107 are adjacent to the visitor bullpen area. Good spot for catching home runs.

zones.name: 100 Level Infield - First Base Side
zones.position: First base line into home plate area

zones.name: 100 Level Infield - Third Base Side
zones.position: Home plate area into third base line

zones.name: 100 Level Left Field Corner
zones.notes: Sections 135-138 are good spots for catching home runs

zones.name: 100 Level Outfield - Left Field
zones.notes: A sections are closer to the field, B sections are further back. Typically among the cheapest lower-level tickets.

levels.name: 200 Level
levels.description: Mezzanine level with elevated views. Most sections have fewer than 15 rows with entrance at the top. Covered seating generally begins around Row 8.

zones.name: WestJet Flight Deck
zones.notes: Standing-room social area in center field between sections 207 and 210. No numbered sections 208/209 exist in this gap.

zones.name: 200 Level Corner - Right Field
zones.position: Right field corner, transitioning to infield

zones.name: 200 Level Infield - Behind Home Plate (Premium)
zones.notes: Premium club sections including Rogers Banner Club and KPMG Blueprint Club. A/B sub-sections with A rows closer to the field.

zones.name: 200 Level Infield - Third Base Side
zones.notes: Sections 229-230 are corner sections. Sections 232-236 down the line offer good value with comparable sightlines to premium infield.

zones.name: 200 Level Corner - Left Field
zones.position: Left field corner, transitioning to outfield

levels.name: 500 Level
levels.description: Upper deck seating. Most sections have 21-24 rows starting at Row 1. Budget-friendly options with full-field views.

zones.name: 500 Level Outfield - Right Field
zones.notes: Adjacent to Corona Rooftop Patio. Sections may have limited availability due to renovations.

zones.name: 500 Level End - Right Field
zones.notes: Sections 508-511 are closest to the Corona Rooftop Patio

zones.name: 500 Level Corner - First Base Side
zones.notes: Closer to the field than behind home plate. With roof open, first base side is susceptible to sun.

zones.name: 500 Level Infield - Behind Home Plate
zones.notes: Sections 522-526 have excellent center field scoreboard views. Best value on the 500 level.

zones.name: 500 Level Corner - Third Base Side
zones.notes: With roof open, third base side is covered/shaded

zones.name: 500 Level End - Left Field
zones.notes: Sections 537-540 are closest to TD Park Social

zones.name: 500 Level Outfield - Left Field
zones.notes: Furthest outfield sections. Sections may have limited availability due to renovations.

socialAreas.name: WestJet Flight Deck
socialAreas.description: Standing-room social area with views toward home plate

socialAreas.name: Corona Rooftop Patio
socialAreas.description: Rooftop patio with upscale bar and food options, near sections 508-511

socialAreas.name: TD Park Social
socialAreas.description: Neighborhood park-inspired area with games and outdoor social seating, near sections 537-540

socialAreas.name: Sportsnet Grill
socialAreas.description: Dining venue with game views and specialty menu items

socialAreas.name: Schneider's Porch
socialAreas.description: Social area in the Outfield District
